applied.note: Parametrik qilindi: module.exports=function(paramName='id'){...req.params[paramName]...}. Javob {success:false,message:'Resource not found'} (eski 'Invalid ID format' o'rniga, CastError bilan bir xil 404). Default 'id' — courseRoutes/videoRoutes'dagi eski validateObjectId() chaqiruvlari buzilmadi.

validateObjectId import qo'shildi. /:id/save, /:id/save DELETE, /:id, /:id/view, /:id/like, /:id DELETE, /:id/feature → validateObjectId('id') authenticate (va requireAdmin) dan keyin, controller'dan oldin.
import qo'shildi. /course/:courseId → ('courseId'), /:sectionId/videos/:videoId → ('sectionId'), /:id PUT & DELETE → ('id'). requireAdmin tartibi saqlandi.
import qo'shildi. /:id, /:id/complete, /:id/review, /:id PUT & DELETE → ('id'), /course/:courseId → ('courseId'). optionalAuth/authenticate/requireAdmin tartibi saqlandi.
import qo'shildi. /:userId POST & DELETE → ('userId') authenticate'dan keyin, /:userId/stats → ('userId').
catch bloki raw err.message leak'i olib tashlandi: console.error('[prompt-sub-check]', err) + generic {success:false, message:'Server xatosi'}.
User.findById dan keyin null guard qo'shildi: if(!user) → 401 AUTH_REQUIRED 'Tizimga kiring.' performSubscriptionCheck chaqiruvidan oldin.
userStatsSchema.index({xp:-1}) va ({weeklyXp:-1}) allaqachon mavjud (123-124 qatorlar). Qo'shilmadi.

userSchema.index({ telegramUserId: 1 }, { sparse: true }) qo'shildi (bot lookup hot-path). Eslatma: socialSubscriptions.telegram.telegramUserId alohida nested field — bu fix top-level telegramUserId uchun.

node_check: PASS — barcha 12 fayl + backend/index.js node --check'dan o'tdi
summary: 12 fix qo'llandi (11 fixed, 1 already_fixed). validateObjectId parametrik qilindi (404 'Resource not found'); 9 route faylga param-aware validateObjectId middleware qo'shildi (authenticate/requireAdmin tartibi saqlangan); requireTelegramForPrompts raw error leak (SEC-001) va null user guard (SEC-002) tuzatildi; User.telegramUserId sparse index qo'shildi. UserStats indexlari allaqachon bor edi. node --check barcha fayllarda + index.js da PASS.
